name: year
description: Election year.

name: id_state
description: State FIPS code (2-digit, zero-padded).

name: id_county
description: County FIPS code (5-digit, zero-padded); blank for non-county reporting units.

name: id_jurisdiction
description: Jurisdiction FIPS code (10-digit): the reporting subdivision, equal to the county except in New England, Wisconsin and Alaska.

name: jurisdiction_name
description: Jurisdiction name (county, or town in New England, Wisconsin and Alaska).

name: precinct
description: Precinct name as reported by the source; *FLOATING* denotes returns reported above the precinct level.

name: office
description: Office contested, standardized (e.g. US PRESIDENT, US SENATE, GOVERNOR, STATE HOUSE).

name: office_category
description: Office group of the source file: PRESIDENT, SENATE, HOUSE, STATE or LOCAL.

name: district
description: District of the office; zero-padded number, STATEWIDE, or blank.

name: magnitude
description: Number of seats elected for the office (usually 1).

name: candidate
description: Candidate name; also OVERVOTES, UNDERVOTES, WRITE-IN.

name: party_detailed
description: Full party label of the ballot line, uppercase; fusion lines joined with a slash.

name: party_simplified
description: Party collapsed to DEMOCRAT, REPUBLICAN, LIBERTARIAN or OTHER.

name: indicator_special
description: Whether the contest was a special election.

name: indicator_writein
description: Whether the candidate was a write-in.

name: mode
description: Mode of voting; TOTAL when not broken down by mode.

name: votes
description: Votes received by the candidate on this ballot line in this precinct.

name: stage
description: Electoral stage: GEN, PRI or RUNOFF.

name: date
description: Election date.

name: indicator_readme_check
description: Whether the source README notes a caveat for this row (2018-2022 only).
